description.value: When a topic draws your interest, you learn all you can about it but can just as easily shift to a new subject at the drop of a hat. Gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] feat. During your daily preparations, if you have access to the infosphere or any relevant learning material, you can swap the Lore skill you have selected with your Additional Lore feat (including any additional skill increases applied to that Lore skill using Additional Lore). Since the proficiency from this selection is temporary, you can't use it to satisfy a prerequisite for a permanent character option (like a feat).
